Family Budget

Enter the household PIN to open the shared budget.

Family Budget Dashboard

Start with the bank balance, mark paychecks as received, mark bills as paid, and keep the unpaid bills at the top.

Money Right Now

Current bank total is starting balance plus received paychecks minus paid bills.

Zero-based
Current bank total $0
Received pay $0
Paid bills $0
Pending bills $0
Safe after pending $0
Family activities $0

Paychecks

Edit each amount when the money hits the account. Your checks are set for the 1st and 15th. Your wife's checks repeat every two weeks from June 18, 2026.

Pending Bills

These are the bills that still need to be paid this month.

Paid Bills

Paid bills roll down here so the pending list stays clean.

Every Dollar's Purpose

Transportation is monthly with a weekly view. Transactions reduce the bucket they belong to.

Transactions

Add grocery, misc, transportation, family, house, or savings spending as it happens.

Expense And Fund Breakdown

Planned budget and what has actually been spent this month.

$0Total planned

Google Calendar Alerts

Download reminders for bills or use the one-click Google Calendar links.

Month-Over-Month Tracking

Save a snapshot at the end of each month to compare income, spending, savings, and family activities.

Month Income Bills Goals Actual spent Family activities Safe balance Left
